message:
audit: deep audit of subject.rs (~1100 new lines) and lines.rs (416L) — batch 468

- src/messaging/subject.rs (3809L): Re-audit of new code since last full
  audit. Root wildcard, queue-cursor fairness, generation-aware restore,
  lab-runtime subscription tests. SOUND.
- src/io/lines.rs (416L): Full deep audit. Cooperative budgeting, CRLF
  normalization, fail-closed UTF-8, EOF fusing. 13 tests. SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
